reviews.comment:
Baños impresentables , fila para entras , sin papel ni jabón osea lo básico, las puertas no cierran, tachos desbordados y todos sucios

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms are appalling, there's a line to get in, no toilet paper or soap (the basics), the doors don't close, the bins are overflowing and filthy.
